title: Terry doubles base combat stats with Jerry under source

card.rawText: During your turn, you may place a "Jerry" card under this card. Then, double this creature's base AL, SPD, Atk Dice Rolls, and Modifier. If this card leaves the field or changes control, "Jerry" stays on the field. (This effect cannot stack).

effect.value: Double this creature's base AL, SPD, Atk Dice Rolls, and Modifier while Jerry is under this card
effect.durationText: While Jerry remains under this card

plan.title: Terry doubles base combat stats with Jerry under source
plan.summary: Attach Jerry under Terry and verify Terry's effective AL, SPD, Atk Dice Rolls, and Modifier are doubled.

notes: Pre-place Jerry under Terry before reading effective stats.

steps: Set Terry as player_1 primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Terry attack dice doubles from 3 to 6

manualVerification: Confirm multiple Jerry cards do not apply multiple doubling layers.
riskNotes: This fixture verifies effective stat layers; card activation prompting is covered separately.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
